flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Suffolk County Community College rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.5k → $4.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Suffolk County Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (18.7% → 16.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Suffolk County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Suffolk County Community College are 21% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($49.9k vs $41.2k).
